drag left = move · ⚔️ = swing · ⚡ = dash

3D SURVIVAL

You're an ogre. Swing real weapons through endless waves of swamp creatures. Every 5th wave: a BOSS. Bosses are born from real SlimeWire launches — slay one, ape it.

⬆️ LEVEL UP — pick your edge
